Video.summary: Three women fight over the same man; a woman must choose between marrying her fiancé or her cousin.
Video.title: Springer Weddings

Video.summary: Kitty came to the show to pose nude for our audience and a camera man while "fooling around" with her friend, Naomi! Next Gee is here to finally get even with her sister, Jenny, for sleeping with her man.
Video.title: Naughty Girls

Video.summary: Summer feels no remorse for having sex with her best friend's boyfriend; Simone confirms that she has something going on with her boyfriend's uncle; Travis' budding career as a hip-hop performer gets in the way of his relationship with Marissa.
Video.title: Ice Cold Breakups

Video.summary: Edwina slept with Mike, her godsister’s fiance! Robert’s man has been fantasizing about a woman named Morgan! Mimi will fight to keep her cheating man Trayl from her best friend Keisha!
Video.title: You've Been Caught!

Video.summary: A young child suffered serious life-threatening injuries, but not only is the mother Jessica considered a suspect, but her boyfriend Major and grandma Crystal are also under investigation! Find out the jaw dropping truth today!
Video.title: 3 Suspects Tested...Who Beat This Baby?

Video.summary: Sparks fly as Victoria confronts the man who stole her man! Can cash strapped Stacy win Janelle back from Big?
Video.title: Cheating Secrets Explode

Video.summary: Stripper Tiny wants to get Brandon away from his baby's mother; Brad decides to take matters into his own hands when his wife refuses to quit stripping.
Video.title: High End Stripper Smackdown

Video.summary: Greg's is trying to end his relationship with Terrance and her sister Ciera! Then, Lisette met George in prison and thought she found her match. But even nude beaches weren't enough to keep him interested because now he's sleeping with a stripper!
Video.title: Battle Of The Dancing Queens!

Video.summary: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a plus-size stripper.
Video.title: Shocking Secret Lovers

Video.summary: Jennison is here to break up Scooter's marriage. Next Jana thinks her boyfriend is cheating, so she invited our cameras to join her when she confronted him at his home. A search of his house revealed another woman in the closet Jana's twin sister!
Video.title: Cheating Lovers Confess!

Video.summary: Santa and his elves to answer 7 very special Christmas letters from needy children. Watch these happy faces!
Video.title: Dear Santa…

Video.summary: Kiki wants to marry the man who cheated with her cousin; Tayshun blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; a porn star wants her crush to act out a scene with her.
Video.title: 50 Shades of Springer

Video.summary: Convict love stories! It's Jerry's jailbird special and he's got two sexy prisoners of love and one mini feisty officer to help keep the inmates in order.
Video.title: Back Off My Jailbird Lover!

Video.summary: Alex says he was forced into his relationship with his girlfriend, and he has a secret to reveal; two women wrestle in applesauce for Lexi's love; Tai has moved from Atlanta to Ohio to be with his baby-mama, but she has a confession to make.
Video.title: Fall Flings

Video.summary: Demetrius cheated on Aleesha with her sister Keshia and also a stripper named Natalie. Then, Kahari's here to reveal to his girlfriend Jasmine that not only is he bi-sexual, but he's also been cheating on he with a transsexual named.
Video.title: Transtastic Confessions

Video.summary: A woman tells her bounty-hunter husband that she is cheating with a stripper, who turns out to be gay; a woman finds out about her boyfriend's secret lover.
Video.title: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Image.alt: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Video.summary: Alex doesn’t think he’s the father of Halie’s baby girl because he suspects she’s unfaithful. Next, Kenchada has been on a revenge spree since Armando cheated on her 4 years ago. Can these relationships be saved?
Video.title: The Most Toxic Relationships Ever

Video.summary: Edith says that as soon as her daughter's new boyfriend moved in, her wallet was stolen and a $600 check was forged; Tuyet was floored when her friend accused her of stealing $30,000 worth of jewelry from her bag.
Video.title: Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?

Image.alt: Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?
Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?
Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?

Video.summary: Martinique is accused of throwing her baby daughter and prostituting in front of her; Alyssa hopes that once she clears her name of cheating, her boyfriend's abuse will stop and she will get her children back from CPS.
Video.title: Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?

Image.alt: Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?
Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?
Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?

Video.summary: Matt accuses Ashely of cheating and physically checks her for signs of infidelity; Justin doubts that he is really the father of Shaitassia's child.
Video.title: DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant

Image.alt: DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant
DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant
DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant

Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Recapping stories involving deplorable acts committed against children.
Video.title: Steve Gets Justice For Children

Video.summary: This mother is trying to regain custody of her daughter which she was convicted of abusing and neglecting. But Steve will not let her even get close to that child.
Video.title: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Image.alt: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Video.summary: Taquita’s ex is in custody for murdering her child, but her step-sisters think that she was aware of the man’s abusive behavior! Then, Dianne gained custody of Tanya’s toddler son after Tanya’s ex shook him, but she suspects Tanya is the abuser!
Video.title: You Failed to Protect Your Son

Image.alt: You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son

Video.summary: Kaliegh is 23 and is a heroin addict. Her mother, best friend and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin in the first place, are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!
Video.title: My Daughter Prostitutes for Heroin

Video.summary: Jesus is worried that Sonja is sleeping with other men in exchange for Cocaine. Then, Jessica is desperate to change Josh's controlling and abusive ways. She says she can no longer live with Josh if he's going to continue threatening her and accusing her of prostitution.
Video.title: Is My Wife A Prostitute

Video.summary: Steve looks back on memorable stories of DNA clearing up years of doubt and mystery or devastating and confirming people's worst fears.
Video.title: DNA: Life-Changing Results

Video.summary: Maria's fiance texts their ex-roommate, saying he wants to leave Maria and be with her; Lisa has lost four jobs because her partner overzealously tries to prevent her from cheating on him.
Video.title: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Image.alt: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Video.summary: Kendra is on a mission to save her from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.
Video.title: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Image.alt: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Video.summary: Penny fears that her 19-year-old daughter's friend may have been involved in the young woman's death; Shay accuses her cousin of sexually assaulting her at a party.
Video.title: Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?

Image.alt: Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?
Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?
Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?

Video.summary: Jennifer fears that her husband Tim is addicted to teenage porn and has heard rumors of him sneaking underage girls into their house. Is Amanda’s man a child molester and peeping Tom? How will these wives react to the lie detector test results?
Video.title: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Image.alt: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Video.summary: Shantee has been forced into prostitution by her boyfriend Tim. When she refused, he beat her, once causing her to suffer a miscarriage. Tim prides himself on controlling and using her as property, but Steve isn’t about to let this continue!
Video.title: He Punches Me Until I Prostitute

Image.alt: He Punches Me Until I Prostitute
He Punches Me Until I Prostitute
He Punches Me Until I Prostitute
